name: ml-matrix
when_to_use: 需要 SVD/特征分解(EVD)/QR/LU/Cholesky、矩阵求逆、伪逆或线性方程组求解(solve Ax=b)这类经过工程验证的数值线代时用它,而非手算或让 mathjs 凑——mathjs 只打包基础 multiply/inv/det/eigs,缺完整分解族与 pseudoInverse/solve;非做符号运算(那用 mathjs/nerdamer)。
why_valuable: AI 徒手做矩阵分解(SVD、特征值、QR、LU、Cholesky)几乎必错:这些是迭代数值算法而非可背诵的闭式公式,连求逆和最小二乘在 4×4 以上都累积算术误差。ml-matrix 给出经验证的分解与方程组求解,让线代可视化/降维/拟合建立在正确数值上。

data_in.note: 喂 number[][] 行优先二维数组(每行等长);ml-matrix 的 API 大量返回 Matrix 实例而非数组,消费 AI 渲染前须用 .to2DArray()/.to1DArray() 取回。determinant/inverse 需方阵。

schema.matrix: number[][] —— 行优先二维数组,每行等长;传给 new Matrix(matrix)
schema.operation?: 'mmul'|'transpose'|'inverse'|'solve'|'svd'|'evd' —— 不预设动词,消费 AI 直接调对应 API
schema.rightHandSide?: number[][] —— solve(A,b) 的右端项 b(列向量或矩阵),行数须等于 A 的行数

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;纯 JS 数值层。
provides.outputs: Matrix 对象及其运算结果:mmul/transpose/inverse/pseudoInverse/solve,以及 SVD/EVD/QR/LU/Cholesky 分解产物(均为 Matrix,用 .to2DArray() 取回原生数组)。

api_surface.core: A.mmul(B) · A.transpose() · A.to2DArray() · A.get(r,c)/set(r,c,v) · A.rows / A.columns(维度)
api_surface.solve: solve(A, b, useSVD?) → Matrix(解 Ax=b) · inverse(A) · pseudoInverse(A, threshold?) · determinant(A)
api_surface.decompose: new SVD(A) → {leftSingularVectors, rightSingularVectors} · new EVD(A) → {realEigenvalues, imaginaryEigenvalues, eigenvectorMatrix}

peer.note: 本条只产 Matrix / 标量:把变换后坐标或分解结果 .to2DArray() 后交给图表组件画热力图/向量/降维散点。

boot.note: 所有分解/求解结果是 ml-matrix Matrix 实例,取回原生数组须 .to2DArray();determinant/inverse 要求方阵,solve 的 A 与 b 行数须一致,消费 AI 调用前自检维度。EVD 适用于方阵(实特征值在 realEigenvalues)。

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr ml-matrix@6.14.0 +esm: named exports present — Matrix, SingularValueDecomposition as SVD, EigenvalueDecomposition as EVD, QR, LU, CholeskyDecomposition, solve, inverse, pseudoInverse, determinant, correlation, covariance; `export default Matrix` (matrix.d.ts:1058). Signatures from matrix.d.ts: solve(leftHandSide, rightHandSide, useSVD?)→Matrix (1369); inverse(MaybeMatrix, useSVD?)→Matrix (1380); pseudoInverse(MaybeMatrix, threshold?)→Matrix (1421); class SingularValueDecomposition{ readonly leftSingularVectors:Matrix; readonly rightSingularVectors:Matrix } (1465–1491); class EigenvalueDecomposition{ eigenvectorMatrix; realEigenvalues; imaginaryEigenvalues } (1508–1513). MaybeMatrix=Matrix|number[][] so boot passes plain arrays. grep of +esm for document.*/window.*/globalThis.*/appendChild/createElement/addEventListener/localStorage = 0 hits — pure numeric, zero DOM/global footprint, trivially shadow-safe.

en.when_to_use: Use it for production-tested numerical linear algebra such as SVD/eigendecomposition (EVD)/QR/LU/Cholesky, matrix inverse, pseudoinverse, or solving linear systems (Ax=b), instead of hand calculation or forcing mathjs to do it. mathjs only bundles basic multiply/inv/det/eigs and lacks the full decomposition family and pseudoInverse/solve. Not for symbolic math; use mathjs/nerdamer for that.
en.why_valuable: Handwritten matrix decomposition by AI, including SVD, eigenvalues, QR, LU, and Cholesky, is almost always wrong: these are iterative numerical algorithms, not memorized closed-form formulas, and even inverse and least squares accumulate arithmetic error above 4x4. ml-matrix provides verified decompositions and system solvers so linear-algebra visualizations, dimensionality reduction, and fitting use correct numbers.

data_in.note: Pass a row-major number[][] with equal-length rows. Many ml-matrix APIs return Matrix instances rather than arrays; consuming AI must call .to2DArray()/.to1DArray() before rendering. determinant/inverse require square matrices.

schema.matrix: number[][] -- Row-major two-dimensional array with equal-length rows; passed to new Matrix(matrix)
schema.operation?: 'mmul'|'transpose'|'inverse'|'solve'|'svd'|'evd' -- No verb is preselected; consuming AI calls the corresponding API directly
schema.rightHandSide?: number[][] -- Right-hand side b for solve(A,b), as a column vector or matrix; row count must equal A's row count
